Our Programmes

TRAIN WITH
THE BEST

Structured football development for ages 5–18. Every session is designed to build skill, confidence and teamwork.

AED 700/MONTH · 3 SESSIONS/WEEK · 45 MIN · GROUPS OF 6–8 PLAYERS
UNDER-8
Ages 5–7

Introduction to football fundamentals — dribbling, coordination and teamwork through fun activities designed for young players.

3/week
Sessions
45 min
Duration
AED 600/month
UNDER-10
Ages 8–9

Technical development focus — passing, shooting and positional awareness. Players begin competitive small-sided games.

3/week
Sessions
45 min
Duration
AED 600/month
POPULAR
UNDER-12
Ages 10–11

Advanced technical skills — dribbling under pressure, combination play and individual tactical understanding.

3/week
Sessions
45 min
Duration
AED 600/month
UNDER-14
Ages 12–13

Competitive development — team formations, set pieces, video analysis, and monthly individual development plans.

3/week
Sessions
45 min
Duration
AED 600/month
UNDER-16
Ages 14–16

Elite development — advanced tactics, S&C conditioning, 1-on-1 coaching, video analysis, and monthly progress reports.

3/week
Sessions
45 min
Duration
AED 600/month
☀️ SUMMER
CAMP
Ages 5–18

Intensive 3-month holiday programme. Daily 2-hour sessions for all skill levels. Skills, games, competitions and fun.

Daily
Sessions
2 hrs
Duration
AED 2,000 / 3 months
Try Before You Join

📅 ONE DAY CLASS

Not sure which programme is right? Book a single session and experience LOBO Academy before committing.

AED 100
per session

Coaching Team

MEET THE
COACHES

Six experienced coaches dedicated to developing Dubai's next generation of football talent.

EXPERIENCED · DEDICATED · PASSIONATE ABOUT YOUTH DEVELOPMENT
AH
Ahmed Hassan
Head Coach

Leads the LOBO Academy coaching programme. Oversees all age groups and designs the curriculum for each level.

10+ years exp
MG
Maria Garcia
Under-8 & Under-10 Coach

Specialises in early childhood football development. Known for creative, fun-first training methods that build confidence.

8 years exp
RN
Rami Nasser
Fitness & Conditioning

Former professional player turned coach. Oversees physical conditioning, speed training and S&C for older groups.

12 years exp
JR
Juan Rodriguez
Technical Director

Designs the technical curriculum across all age groups. Focuses on ball mastery, 1v1 situations and combination play.

15 years exp
SA
Sara Ahmed
Under-12 Coach

Delivers advanced technical sessions with a focus on dribbling, passing patterns and positional awareness.

7 years exp
TK
Tariq Khalil
Under-14 & Under-16 Coach

Prepares older players for competitive football. Specialises in tactics, set pieces and video analysis sessions.

9 years exp
